properties.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(SailPointIDN_Events_CL
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Id = coalesce(id_s, id_g),
    Name = name_s,
    Created = created_t,
    Action = action_s,
    EventType = type_s,
    TechnicalName = technicalName_s,
    Operation = operation_s,
    Status = status_s,
    ActorName = actor_name_s,
    TargetName = target_name_s,
    Org = org_s,
    Pod = pod_s,
    Stack = stack_s,
    TrackingNumber = trackingNumber_g,
    Synced = synced_t,
    Index = _index_s,
    DocType = _type_s,
    Objects = objects_s,
    Details = details_g,
    AttributesOperation = attributes_operation_s,
    AttributesProcessId = attributes_processId_g,
    AttributesDuration = attributes_duration_s,
    AttributesIdentitiesProcessed = attributes_identitiesProcessed_s,
    AttributesIdentitiesTotal = attributes_identitiesTotal_s,
    AttributesIdentitiesSelected = attributes_identitiesSelected_s,
    AttributesGroupsDeltaTokenBefore = attributes_groupsDeltaToken_before_s,
    AttributesGroupsDeltaTokenAfter = attributes_groupsDeltaToken_after_s,
    AttributesUserDeltaTokenBefore = attributes_userDeltaToken_before_s,
    AttributesUserDeltaTokenAfter = attributes_userDeltaToken_after_s,
    AttributesDirectoryRolesDeltaTokenBefore = attributes_directoryRolesDeltaToken_before_s,
    AttributesDirectoryRolesDeltaTokenAfter = attributes_directoryRolesDeltaToken_after_s,
    AttributesHostName = attributes_hostName_s,
    AttributesUserId = attributes_userId_s,
    AttributesScope = attributes_scope_s,
    AttributesSourceId = attributes_sourceId_g,
    AttributesSourceName = attributes_sourceName_s,
    AttributesAggregationId = attributes_aggregationId_g,
    AttributesCapability = attributes_capability_s,
    SourceSystem),
(SailPointIDN_EventsV2_CL
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Id,
    Name,
    Created,
    Action,
    EventType,
    TechnicalName,
    Operation,
    Status,
    ActorName,
    TargetName,
    Org,
    Pod,
    Stack,
    TrackingNumber,
    Synced,
    Index,
    DocType,
    Objects,
    Details,
    AttributesOperation,
    AttributesProcessId,
    AttributesDuration,
    AttributesIdentitiesProcessed,
    AttributesIdentitiesTotal,
    AttributesIdentitiesSelected,
    AttributesGroupsDeltaTokenBefore,
    AttributesGroupsDeltaTokenAfter,
    AttributesUserDeltaTokenBefore,
    AttributesUserDeltaTokenAfter,
    AttributesDirectoryRolesDeltaTokenBefore,
    AttributesDirectoryRolesDeltaTokenAfter,
    AttributesHostName,
    AttributesUserId,
    AttributesScope,
    AttributesSourceId,
    AttributesSourceName,
    AttributesAggregationId,
    AttributesCapability,
    SourceSystem)
